reasoning: Emotional (60%): The key has a round friendly silhouette and a warm teal+orange colour combo that reads charming at a glance. The rounded bow head and decorative teeth give it personality fitting a toy-diorama Hyrule item. However the bow's black/white checker motif reads slightly chess-board/mechanical rather than magical or whimsical — it pulls the mood slightly away from the saturated greens/blues/yellows/pinks target palette. The grey tones in the bow dominate the first read, softening the brightness. Emotional score ~7/10. Technical (40%): 1px hard outlines are consistent and clean across all zoom panels. Shading uses 2-3 hard tones with no anti-aliasing visible. Pixels are grid-snapped and the design reads well at all zoom levels shown. Hand-pixeled feel is present. Versus Denzi reference (armor/helm items), the pixel discipline is comparable. Technical score ~8/10. Weighted composite: 0.6×7 + 0.4×8 = 7.4 → 7. Passes technical bar, marginal on emotional warmth/saturation.
